name: Picnic Penguin
author: Poki
description: Picnic Penguin is a puzzle game created by Neutronized. Help the penguin to push tasty treats onto the picnic blanket by pushing multiple blocks at a time and rearranging them to open the path. There are several worlds to unlock with a huge variation of puzzles to solve while finding coins to collect all the skins on the gashapon machine. Are you ready for a sick picnic? How to play: Push multiple blocks at a time and rearrange them to open the path and complete the levels. About the creator: Picnic Penguin was created by Neutronized. Play their other racing game on Poki: Magic Bridge , lost-yeti, Drop Wizard Tower and Slime Pizza
